policy.historyStream: referencePoll at or before anchor time

phase6StrictDistillation.reason: phase6 artifacts report coefficient samples only; full trained residual heads/checkpoint are intentionally not written, so exact real-trace replay is not reproducible from existing outputs

policy.historyStream: referencePoll at or before anchor time
policy.labelStream: referencePoll interpolated at anchor time + fixed horizon

syntheticRealGapFindings.finding: real p50 0.000 px/s and p90 707.107 px/s vs synthetic phase4-test p50 520.725 and p90 1604.640; real is dominated by near-stop rows with a small high-speed tail.
real history is dense (p50 101.000, p95 101.000) and has no synthetic dropout scenarios; phase2 intentionally allocates rows equally across clean/10%/25% missing-history scenarios.
real p50/p95 disagreement 1.453 / 36.000 px vs synthetic phase4-test 4.008 / 28.635 px; real has a lower median but a clamp-heavy p95 tail, so disagreement alone did not separate safe LS adoption.
real curvature p95 0.000 deg and acceleration p95 4562071.898 px/s^2 differ from synthetic phase4-test p95 154.239 deg and 255725.861 px/s^2, making phase4's risk score thresholds poorly calibrated.
phase2 full artifact has 3.63% in 0-25 px/s vs real 87.93%; the generator overrepresents mid-speed scripted motion relative to the latest real traces.
